summary: Tested inspection city features: status validation with mechanic requirement, country modal sub-tabs (Leads Cities/Inspection Cities), HR Module Inspection City tab, and mechanic city assignment. All core features working correctly.

minor.issue: API requires employee_id in body even though it's in URL path - redundant but works via frontend

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed MongoDB ObjectId serialization issue in create_inspection endpoint - was returning _id which caused 500 error
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed create_inspection to exclude _id from response
seed_data_creation: Created test inspection 'Test Status Customer' without mechanic for status validation testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Inspection city features fully tested. Venkat Inspector has Mumbai and Bangalore assigned. Test inspections created for status validation testing.

inspection_status_validation.details: Status change to mechanic-required statuses (Assigned, In Progress, Completed) correctly blocked without mechanic. Rescheduled/Cancelled statuses work without mechanic.

country_modal_sub_tabs.details: Country modal shows Leads Cities (5) and Inspection Cities (2) sub-tabs. India has Mumbai, Delhi, Bangalore, Chennai, Hyderabad as leads cities and Mumbai, Bangalore as inspection cities.

hr_module_inspection_city_tab.details: Inspection City tab visible in HR Module for CEO and Inspection Head. Shows mechanics list with their assigned cities. Edit Cities modal works correctly.

mechanic_city_assignment.details: Successfully assigned Mumbai and Bangalore to Venkat Inspector. Cities displayed correctly in table.

mechanic_assignment_city_validation.details: Backend correctly validates mechanic can only be assigned to inspections in their designated cities. Assignment to Pune blocked, assignment to Mumbai succeeded.
